question.string: After whom is the Riemannian geometry named?
Which animal participated in a military operation with the Australian Defence Force?

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?animal WHERE {
  ?operation wdt:P31 wd:Q645883 .
  ?operation wdt:P1963 wd:Q625657 .
  ?animal wdt:P527 ?operation .
}

question.string: among the characters in the witcher, who has two unmarried partners, Yennefer of Vengerberg and Triss Merigold?
among the founders of tencent company, who has been member of national people’s congress?
among the other representative work of the author of hunter x hunter, which one is talking about middle school student?
On which stock exchanges are Siemens AG shares traded?
Apart from the book series the witcher, name all of the author’s notable work.

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?work WHERE {
  ?work wdt:P50 wd:Q20011098 .
  ?work wdt:P1441 ?series .
  FILTER(?series != wd:Q51671721)
}

question.string: are brooke raboutou and colin duffy from same state of the usa?

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?state WHERE {
  { wd:Q2926117 wdt:P19 ?place1 .
    ?place1 wdt:P625 ?coord1 .
    ?place1 wdt:P17 wd:Q6476962 .
    ?place1 wdt:P31 wd:Q515 .
    ?place1 wdt:P131 ?state . }
  UNION
  { wd:Q87192979 wdt:P19 ?place2 .
    ?place2 wdt:P625 ?coord2 .
    ?place2 wdt:P17 wd:Q6476962 .
    ?place2 wdt:P31 wd:Q515 .
    ?place2 wdt:P131 ?state . }
} GROUP BY ?state HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?place1) > 0 && COUNT(DISTINCT ?place2) > 0)

question.string: What is the boiling point of water?
At which school was Yayoi Kusama educated at?
Which High School did Allen Ginsberg attend?
On which island is the Indonesian capital located?
can i play don't starve on play station 4?
How many General Secretaries of the CPSU were there before Leonid Brezhnev?

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT (COUNT(?secretary) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?secretary wdt:P39 wd:Q87004793 .
  ?secretary wdt:P31 wd:Q5 .
  ?secretary wdt:P607 wd:Q765165 .
}

question.string: How many different presidents of Russia have there been that took the position after 1990?
Did adam ondra win a medal in the 2020 summer olympics?

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?medal WHERE {
  wd:Q181278 wdt:P527 ?event .
  ?event wdt:P2522 wd:Q186408 .
  ?event wdt:P361 wd:Q25337 .
  ?event wdt:P543 ?medal .
  ?event wdt:P1889 wd:Q2020 .
}

question.string: Did the Chicago Bulls win at least two seasons of the NBA championship?

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT (COUNT(?season) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?season wdt:P2522 wd:Q18156668 .
  ?team wdt:P31 wd:Q36655 .
  ?team wdt:P127 wd:wd:Q128109 .
} GROUP BY ?team HAVING (?count >= 2)

question.string: Did Haruki Murakami receive the Nobel Prize in Literature?
Did Kobe Bryant leave the Lakers when LeBron James joined that team?

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?kobe ?lebron WHERE {
  wd:Q25369 wdt:P54 wd:Q121783 .
  wd:Q36159 wdt:P54 wd:Q121783 .
  FILTER(?kobe != ?lebron)
}

question.string: Find all Turkish verbs ending with “uş” with their lemma.
From which country are the beagles originally from?
From which country came the 2nd most winners of the Emmy Award ?

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?country (COUNT(?winner) AS ?winnerCount) WHERE {
  ?winner wdt:P166 wd:Q66716595.
  ?winner wdt:P27 ?country.
}
GROUP BY ?country
ORDER BY DESC(?winnerCount)
LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1
